strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Active AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at current role
Strong testing/craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and workshop teaching
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is dated (pre-2018)
Limited explicit cloud/Kubernetes depth beyond AWS CDK and self-hosted k8s
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned fullstack engineer well beyond the 6+ year bar, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node/React experience and current hands-on work in AI-agent tooling and MCP, which maps closely to the role's internal automation focus. Gaps around Nest.js and current Kotlin/Java are real but learnable given the demonstrated polyglot track record and craftsmanship orientation.
